title: OVC Design Record Engine — Golden Chat

parts: OVC invariant check: fail-closed, pointer gating, MANIFEST.sha256, LATEST_OK_RUN_POINTER. Option A–D. See scripts/path1/validate_post_run.py
Acknowledged. The design record must be append-only with deterministic JSONL. Use sha256 seals. Enforce pointer gating.
Module inference: modules are overlapping documents + recurring concepts + shared invariants. Extract modules + purposes from chat history.
